memberdef.name: XVphy_IsTxUsingQpll
memberdef.initializer: ((XVPHY_PLL_TYPE_QPLL == \ XVphy_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XVPHY_DIR_TX, ChId)) || \ (XVPHY_PLL_TYPE_QPLL0 == \ XVphy_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XVPHY_DIR_TX, ChId)) || \ (XVPHY_PLL_TYPE_QPLL1 == \ XVphy_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XVPHY_DIR_TX, ChId)) || \ (XVPHY_PLL_TYPE_PLL0 == \ XVphy_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XVPHY_DIR_TX, ChId)) || \ (XVPHY_PLL_TYPE_PLL1 == \ XVphy_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XVPHY_DIR_TX, ChId)))

memberdef.name: XVphy_IsRxUsingQpll
memberdef.initializer: ((XVPHY_PLL_TYPE_QPLL == \ XVphy_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XVPHY_DIR_RX, ChId)) || \ (XVPHY_PLL_TYPE_QPLL0 == \ XVphy_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XVPHY_DIR_RX, ChId)) || \ (XVPHY_PLL_TYPE_QPLL1 == \ XVphy_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XVPHY_DIR_RX, ChId)) || \ (XVPHY_PLL_TYPE_PLL0 == \ XVphy_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XVPHY_DIR_RX, ChId)) || \ (XVPHY_PLL_TYPE_PLL1 == \ XVphy_GetPllType(InstancePtr, QuadId, XVPHY_DIR_RX, ChId)))

briefdescription.para: This typedef enumerates the various protocols handled by the Video PHY controller (VPHY).
This typedef enumerates the list of available interrupt handler types.

detaileddescription.para: The values are used as parameters to the XVphy_SetIntrHandler function.

briefdescription.para: This typedef enumerates the list of available hdmi handler types.

detaileddescription.para: The values are used as parameters to the XVphy_SetHdmiCallback function.

briefdescription.para: This typedef enumerates the different PLL types for a given GT channel.
This typedef enumerates the available channels.
This typedef enumerates the available reference clocks for the PLL clock selection multiplexer.
This typedef enumerates the available reference clocks used to drive the RX/TX datapaths.
This typedef enumerates the available reference clocks used to drive the RX/TX output clocks.
This typedef enumerates the available clocks that are used as multiplexer input selections for the RX/TX output clock.
Transceiver GT state machine states for the VPHY controller.

detaileddescription.para: Enumerates the possible states a GT can be in within the VPHY controller.

briefdescription.para: Log event GT PLL Layout Change.
Log event VidClk more than 148.5 MHz.
Log event Vid not supported no DRU.
Log event QPLL Config not found.
Log event QPLL Config not found.
Log event Vid format not supported.
Log event MMCM Config not found.
Log event DRU clk wrong freq.
Log event usrclk more than 297 MHz.
This typedef enumerates the Video PHY log events.
This typedef enumerates the different MMCM Dividers.
This typedef enumerates the possible error conditions.
This typedef enumerates the Linerate to TMDS Clock ratio for HDMI TX TMDS Clock pattern generator.
This typedef enumerates the available PRBS patterns available from the.
Callback type which represents the handler for interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.

briefdescription.para: Callback type which represents a custom timer wait handler.

detaileddescription.para: This is only used for Microblaze since it doesn't have a native sleep function. To avoid dependency on a hardware timer, the default wait functionality is implemented using loop iterations; this isn't too accurate. If a custom timer handler is used, the user may implement their own wait implementation using a hardware timer (see example/) for better accuracy.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.
is the number of microseconds to be passed to the timer function.
is a pointer to the callback reference.
is a pointer to the callback reference.

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the configuration for this Video PHY instance and fills in the InstancePtr->Config structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.
is a pointer to the configuration structure that will be used to copy the settings from.
is the device base address in the virtual memory space. If the address translation is not used, then the physical address is passed.

simplesect.para: Unexpected errors may occur if the address mapping is changed after this function is invoked.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_PllRefClkSelType QpllRefClkSel, XVphy_PllRefClkSelType CpllxRefClkSel, XVphy_PllType TxPllSelect, XVphy_PllType RxPllSelect)
memberdef.name: XVphy_PllInitialize

briefdescription.para: This function will initialize the PLL selection for a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.

is the QPLL reference clock selection for the quad.
In GTP, this is used to hold PLL0 refclk selection.

is the CPLL reference clock selection for the quad.
In GTP, this is used to hold PLL1 refclk selection.
is the reference clock selection for the quad's TX PLL dividers.
is the reference clock selection for the quad's RX PLL dividers.

briefdescription.para: This function will obtian the IP version.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.

simplesect.para: The IP version of the Video PHY core.

briefdescription.para: This function is the delay/sleep function for the XVphy driver.

detaileddescription.para: For the Zynq family, there exists native sleep functionality. For MicroBlaze however, there does not exist such functionality. In the MicroBlaze case, the default method for delaying is to use a predetermined amount of loop iterations. This method is prone to inaccuracy and dependent on system configuration; for greater accuracy, the user may supply their own delay/sleep handler, pointed to by InstancePtr->UserTimerWaitUs, which may have better accuracy if a hardware timer is used.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.
is the number of microseconds to delay/sleep for.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, u64 LineRateHz)
memberdef.name: XVphy_CfgLineRate

detaileddescription.para: This is a software only configuration and this value is used in the PLL calculator.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the line rate in Hz to configure software.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the reference clock type is valid.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, XVphy_ChannelId ChId)
memberdef.name: XVphy_GetPllType

briefdescription.para: Obtain the channel's PLL reference clock selection.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is the channel ID which to operate on.

simplesect.para: The PLL type being used by the channel.

briefdescription.para: This function will return the line rate in Hz for a given channel / quad.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to check.
is the channel ID for which to retrieve the line rate.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, u8 Hold)
memberdef.name: XVphy_ResetGtPll

briefdescription.para: This function will reset the GT's PLL logic.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is an indicator whether to "hold" the reset if set to 1. If set to 0: reset, then enable.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, u8 Hold)
memberdef.name: XVphy_ResetGtTxRx

briefdescription.para: This function will reset the GT's TX/RX logic.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is an indicator whether to "hold" the reset if set to 1. If set to 0: reset, then enable.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, u8 Polarity)
memberdef.name: XVphy_SetPolarity

briefdescription.para: This function will set/clear the TX/RX polarity bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
0-Not inverted 1-Inverted

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, XVphy_PrbsPattern Pattern)
memberdef.name: XVphy_SetPrbsSel

briefdescription.para: This function will set the TX/RXPRBSEL of the GT.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is the pattern XVphy_PrbsPattern

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, u8 ForceErr)
memberdef.name: XVphy_TxPrbsForceError

briefdescription.para: This function will set the TX/RXPRBSEL of the GT.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
0-No Error 1-Force Error

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, u8 Vs)
memberdef.name: XVphy_SetTxVoltageSwing

briefdescription.para: This function will set the TX voltage swing value for a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the voltage swing value to write.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, u8 Pe)
memberdef.name: XVphy_SetTxPreEmphasis

briefdescription.para: This function will set the TX pre-emphasis value for a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the pre-emphasis value to write.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, u8 Pc)
memberdef.name: XVphy_SetTxPostCursor

briefdescription.para: This function will set the TX post-cursor value for a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the post-cursor value to write.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: XVphy_SetRxLpm

briefdescription.para: This function will enable or disable the LPM logic in the Video PHY core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
will enable (if 1) or disable (if 0) the LPM logic.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, u16 Addr, u16 Val)
memberdef.name: XVphy_DrpWr

briefdescription.para: This function will initiate a write DRP transaction.

detaileddescription.para: It is a wrapper around XVphy_DrpAccess.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID on which to direct the DRP access.
is the DRP address to issue the DRP access to.
is the value to write to the DRP address.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the DRP access was successful.
XST_FAILURE otherwise, if the busy bit did not go low, or if the ready bit did not go high.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, u16 Addr, u16 *RetVal)
memberdef.name: XVphy_DrpRd

briefdescription.para: This function will initiate a read DRP transaction.

detaileddescription.para: It is a wrapper around XVphy_DrpAccess.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID on which to direct the DRP access.
is the DRP address to issue the DRP access to.
is the DRP read_value returned implicitly.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the DRP access was successful.
XST_FAILURE otherwise, if the busy bit did not go low, or if the ready bit did not go high.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, u8 Hold)
memberdef.name: XVphy_MmcmPowerDown

briefdescription.para: This function will power down the mixed-mode clock manager (MMCM) core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is an indicator whether to "hold" the power down if set to 1. If set to 0: power down, then power back up.

briefdescription.para: This function will start the mixed-mode clock manager (MMCM) core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: XVphy_IBufDsEnable

briefdescription.para: This function enables the TX or RX IBUFDS peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the IBUFDS, respectively.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the TX or RX CLKOUT1 OBUFTDS peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the OBUFTDS, respectively.

briefdescription.para: This function returns true when the RX and TX are bonded and are running from the same (RX) reference clock.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to check.

simplesect.para: TRUE if the RX and TX are using the same PLL, FALSE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function installs a callback function for the VPHY error conditions.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XVPhy instance.
CallbackFunc
is the address to the callback function.
CallbackRef
is the user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.
None.
The XVphy_ErrorHandler API calls the registered function in ErrorCallback and passes two arguments: 1) CallbackRef 2) Error Type as defined by XVphy_ErrType. Sample Function Call: CallbackFunc(CallbackRef, XVphy_ErrType);

briefdescription.para: This function will print the entire log.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will reset the driver's logginc mechanism.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will read the last event from the log.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will insert an event in the driver's logginc mechanism.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the event type to log.
is the associated data for the event.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the XVphy driver.

detaileddescription.para: It will detect what kind of interrupt has happened, and will invoke the appropriate callback function.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.

briefdescription.para: This function runs a self-test on the XVphy driver/device.

detaileddescription.para: The sanity test checks whether or not all tested registers hold their default reset values.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the self-test passed - all tested registers hold their default reset values.

briefdescription.para: This function looks for the device configuration based on the unique device ID.

detaileddescription.para: The table XVphy_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration information for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the device being looked up.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration table entry corresponding to the given device ID, or NULL if no match is found.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, XVphy_Config *CfgPtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_PllRefClkSelType CpllRefClkSel, XVphy_PllRefClkSelType QpllRefClkSel, XVphy_PllType TxPllSelect, XVphy_PllType RxPllSelect, u8 LinkRate)
memberdef.name: XVphy_DpInitialize

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVidC_PixelsPerClock Ppc, XVidC_ColorDepth Bpc, XVidC_ColorFormat ColorFormat)
memberdef.name: XVphy_SetHdmiTxParam

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, XVidC_PixelsPerClock Ppc, XVidC_ColorDepth Bpc)
memberdef.name: XVphy_HdmiCfgCalcMmcmParam

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_SysClkDataSelType TxSysPllClkSel, XVphy_SysClkDataSelType RxSysPllClkSel)
memberdef.name: XVphy_HdmiUpdateClockSelection

briefdescription.para: This function prints out Video PHY register and GT Channel and Common DRP register contents.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Vphy core instance.
